fa-message-check.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a small checkmark overlaid in the lower-right corner; chat bubble outline with a tick or checkmark badge
fa-message-check.functionalityId: confirms a message has been received or approved; marks a chat message as verified or completed
fa-message-check.intentId: verify or confirm a message was delivered or acknowledged; mark a conversation item as approved

fa-message-code.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and small angled bracket symbols (less-than and greater-than) overlaid inside; chat bubble outline with code bracket glyphs
fa-message-code.functionalityId: represents a message containing code or a code snippet; sends or displays a programming code block within a chat
fa-message-code.intentId: share or display code content in a chat message; indicate a message thread used for technical or developer communication

fa-message-dollar.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a dollar sign symbol overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a currency glyph badge
fa-message-dollar.functionalityId: represents a financial or payment-related message; sends or displays a monetary amount or transaction in a chat
fa-message-dollar.intentId: communicate a price, payment, or financial request via message; indicate a chat thread related to billing or money transfer

fa-message-exclamation.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a bold exclamation mark glyph centered inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with an alert punctuation mark
fa-message-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a message as urgent or requiring immediate attention; sends an alert or warning notification via chat
fa-message-exclamation.intentId: alert a recipient to an urgent or important message; highlight a critical notification in a messaging interface

fa-message-heart.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a heart shape overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a love or like symbol inside
fa-message-heart.functionalityId: represents a message expressing affection or a like reaction; sends a heart or love emoji in a chat conversation
fa-message-heart.intentId: express affection or appreciation through a chat message; react to a message with a heart or favorite gesture

fa-message-image.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a small image frame or picture rectangle with a landscape-mountain thumbnail inside the bubble; chat bubble outline with a photo placeholder badge
fa-message-image.functionalityId: represents a message containing an image or photo attachment; sends or previews a picture within a chat thread
fa-message-image.intentId: share or view an image file within a chat message; indicate a message thread that contains photo content

fa-message-lines.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and two or three short horizontal lines stacked inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with text line strokes
fa-message-lines.functionalityId: represents a text-based or multi-line message; indicates a chat bubble containing body text or a written note
fa-message-lines.intentId: compose or view a text message with multiple lines of content; access a chat thread containing a written message

fa-message-medical.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a medical cross or plus sign overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a healthcare cross badge
fa-message-medical.functionalityId: represents a medical or health-related message or consultation; sends or displays a healthcare inquiry in a chat
fa-message-medical.intentId: communicate a medical question or health update via message; access a telemedicine or health chat interface

fa-message-middle.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a center-bottom tail pointing straight down from the middle of the base; chat bubble outline with a centrally positioned downward tail
fa-message-middle.functionalityId: represents a message callout anchored to a central element; positions a speech bubble indicator at the midpoint below a target
fa-message-middle.intentId: display a tooltip or callout bubble pointing to the center of a referenced item; annotate a central element with a speech bubble

fa-message-middle-top.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a center-top tail pointing straight up from the middle of the top edge; chat bubble outline with a centrally positioned upward tail
fa-message-middle-top.functionalityId: represents a message callout anchored above a central element; positions a speech bubble indicator pointing upward from the center
fa-message-middle-top.intentId: display a tooltip or callout bubble pointing upward to the center of a referenced item; annotate an element below with a speech bubble

fa-message-minus.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a short horizontal minus or dash symbol overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a subtraction or remove glyph
fa-message-minus.functionalityId: removes a message or decrements a message count; marks a chat item for deletion or mutes a conversation
fa-message-minus.intentId: delete or remove a message from a thread; reduce the number of active messages or mute a chat

fa-message-music.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a small musical note glyph overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a single eighth note or beamed notes badge
fa-message-music.functionalityId: represents a message containing an audio track or music sharing; sends or displays a song or audio clip within a chat
fa-message-music.intentId: share music or an audio file via a chat message; indicate a conversation thread related to music playback

fa-message-pen.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a diagonal pen or pencil shape overlaid inside or at the corner of the bubble; chat bubble outline with an edit instrument badge
fa-message-pen.functionalityId: enables editing or composing a message; opens a chat message for writing or modification
fa-message-pen.intentId: compose, draft, or edit a message in a chat interface; open a message editor within a conversation thread

fa-message-plus.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a plus sign overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with an addition or new-item glyph
fa-message-plus.functionalityId: creates a new message or adds a message to a conversation; initiates a new chat thread or adds a reply
fa-message-plus.intentId: start a new message or add a message to an existing thread; create or expand a conversation in a messaging interface

fa-message-question.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a question mark glyph centered inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with an inquiry punctuation mark
fa-message-question.functionalityId: represents a question or inquiry sent via message; opens a help or FAQ chat interface
fa-message-question.intentId: ask a question or request help through a chat message; access a Q&A or support conversation thread

fa-message-quote.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and two small curved quotation mark glyphs overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with opening-and-closing quote symbols
fa-message-quote.functionalityId: represents a quoted reply or cited message in a conversation; inserts or displays a quotation within a chat thread
fa-message-quote.intentId: quote or reference a prior message in a reply; attribute a statement or display a cited text within a chat

fa-message-slash.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a diagonal slash line drawn through the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a forward-slash strikethrough
fa-message-slash.functionalityId: disables or mutes a message channel; indicates that messaging is blocked or unavailable
fa-message-slash.intentId: mute, block, or disable a chat or messaging feature; indicate that a message thread is inactive or restricted

fa-message-smile.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and a simple smiley face or circular emoji outline with curved smile inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a happy face glyph
fa-message-smile.functionalityId: represents a friendly or positive emoji message; sends a smiley face or expresses happiness in a chat
fa-message-smile.intentId: send a positive or friendly reaction in a chat message; express happiness or approval via an emoji in a conversation

fa-message-sms.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and the uppercase text label SMS overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a three-letter SMS acronym badge
fa-message-sms.functionalityId: represents an SMS text message or triggers an SMS send action; indicates a short message service channel in a communication interface
fa-message-sms.intentId: send or receive an SMS text message; access or configure the SMS messaging channel for a contact

fa-message-text.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and one or two short horizontal text-line strokes inside the upper portion of the bubble; chat bubble outline with small ruled text lines
fa-message-text.functionalityId: represents a plain text message or chat entry; displays the body text content of a conversation message
fa-message-text.intentId: view or send a plain text message in a chat thread; access a text-based conversation entry

fa-message-times.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail and an X mark or times glyph overlaid inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a cross or close symbol badge
fa-message-times.functionalityId: deletes or closes a message; dismisses or rejects a chat notification
fa-message-times.intentId: delete, dismiss, or reject a message in a chat interface; close or remove a conversation entry

fa-messages.appearanceId: two overlapping rounded rectangular speech bubbles with tails on opposite corners, one in front of the other; stacked chat bubble pair indicating multiple conversations
fa-messages.functionalityId: opens or accesses multiple conversations or a messaging inbox; represents a multi-thread chat interface
fa-messages.intentId: view or manage multiple chat conversations; access a messaging inbox or multi-user communication interface

fa-messages-dollar.appearanceId: two overlapping rounded rectangular speech bubbles with tails on opposite corners and a dollar sign badge overlaid on the front bubble; stacked chat pair with a currency symbol
fa-messages-dollar.functionalityId: represents financial messaging or payment conversations; sends or tracks monetary transactions via a multi-chat interface
fa-messages-dollar.intentId: manage financial communications or payment-related chat threads; access a billing or money-transfer messaging interface

fa-messages-question.appearanceId: two overlapping rounded rectangular speech bubbles with tails on opposite corners and a question mark glyph overlaid on the front bubble; stacked chat pair with an inquiry symbol
fa-messages-question.functionalityId: opens a multi-conversation help or FAQ interface; represents a support thread with multiple question-and-answer exchanges
fa-messages-question.intentId: access a multi-conversation Q&A or support chat; seek help or answers across multiple message threads

fa-messaging.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a bottom-left tail alongside a smaller overlapping bubble or a single prominent chat bubble with ellipsis dots inside; messaging activity indicator
fa-messaging.functionalityId: opens or represents a general messaging or chat interface; accesses a real-time communication or instant messaging feature
fa-messaging.intentId: access a general-purpose chat or messaging platform; initiate real-time communication with another user

fa-meteor.appearanceId: a solid rounded rock or asteroid shape with a long diagonal streak or flame trail extending behind it toward the lower-left; blazing space rock with a comet-like tail
fa-meteor.functionalityId: represents a meteor, shooting star, or fast-moving celestial object; indicates a rapid or impactful event in a space or game context
fa-meteor.intentId: visualize a meteor or shooting star event; represent speed, impact, or an astronomical phenomenon

fa-meter.appearanceId: a rectangular gauge body with a horizontal level indicator bar or a half-circle dial with a needle, showing a measurement fill level; gauge or meter outline with a level display
fa-meter.functionalityId: displays a measurement reading or current level on a gauge; indicates the value or status of a monitored metric
fa-meter.intentId: monitor or read a measurement level on a gauge; track a resource or performance metric in real time

fa-meter-bolt.appearanceId: a rectangular gauge body with a level indicator bar and a small lightning bolt symbol overlaid as a badge; meter outline with an electrical or energy badge
fa-meter-bolt.functionalityId: displays an electricity or energy usage reading on a gauge; monitors electrical power consumption or voltage level
fa-meter-bolt.intentId: track or read an electricity or energy meter; monitor power consumption on a utility or smart home dashboard

fa-meter-droplet.appearanceId: a rectangular gauge body with a level indicator bar and a small water droplet shape overlaid as a badge; meter outline with a water or liquid drop symbol
fa-meter-droplet.functionalityId: displays a water or fluid usage reading on a gauge; monitors water consumption or liquid flow level
fa-meter-droplet.intentId: track or read a water meter; monitor water or fluid usage on a utility or building management dashboard

fa-meter-fire.appearanceId: a rectangular gauge body with a level indicator bar and a small flame shape overlaid as a badge; meter outline with a fire or heat symbol
fa-meter-fire.functionalityId: displays a gas or heat usage reading on a gauge; monitors fuel consumption or temperature level on a meter
fa-meter-fire.intentId: track or read a gas or heat meter; monitor fuel consumption or thermal output on a utility dashboard

fa-microchip.appearanceId: a small square integrated circuit chip body with rows of short pin lines extending outward from each side; silicon chip outline with evenly spaced connection pins
fa-microchip.functionalityId: represents a microprocessor, integrated circuit, or hardware component; indicates computing hardware or embedded systems
fa-microchip.intentId: identify or manage a hardware component or microprocessor; access settings or information related to a computing chip

fa-microchip-ai.appearanceId: a small square integrated circuit chip body with rows of short pin lines and an AI label or stylized letter badge overlaid on the chip surface; silicon chip outline with an artificial-intelligence identifier
fa-microchip-ai.functionalityId: represents an AI-dedicated processor or neural processing unit; indicates artificial intelligence hardware acceleration
fa-microchip-ai.intentId: identify or configure an AI chip or neural processing component; access AI hardware settings or machine-learning accelerator information

fa-microphone.appearanceId: an upright capsule or oval-shaped microphone head atop a short cylindrical body with a small base; dynamic mic silhouette with a rounded top and narrow neck
fa-microphone.functionalityId: activates or represents audio input or voice recording; enables or indicates microphone access in an application
fa-microphone.intentId: start voice recording or audio input; access microphone settings or enable speech capture

fa-microphone-alt.appearanceId: an upright condenser-style microphone with a slender cylindrical body, wider at the top capsule, on a short base with a horizontal stand arm; side-address or studio condenser mic silhouette
fa-microphone-alt.functionalityId: represents a studio or condenser microphone for high-quality audio capture; activates an alternative or professional-grade microphone input
fa-microphone-alt.intentId: enable or select a studio-quality microphone for recording; access professional audio input settings

fa-microphone-alt-slash.appearanceId: an upright condenser-style microphone silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through it; studio mic outline with a strikethrough indicating disabled state
fa-microphone-alt-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables the alternative or condenser microphone input; indicates that audio capture from a studio mic is turned off
fa-microphone-alt-slash.intentId: mute or disable a studio microphone; indicate that professional audio input is currently inactive

fa-microphone-circle-alt.appearanceId: a filled circle containing a condenser-style microphone silhouette centered inside; circular badge with a studio mic shape in the foreground
fa-microphone-circle-alt.functionalityId: represents a microphone control housed in a circular button; activates or accesses voice input from a circular interface element
fa-microphone-circle-alt.intentId: tap a circular microphone button to enable voice input; access or toggle a mic function from a round control

fa-microphone-slash.appearanceId: an upright capsule microphone silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through it; standard mic outline with a strikethrough indicating muted state
fa-microphone-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables the primary microphone input; indicates that audio capture is turned off or unavailable
fa-microphone-slash.intentId: mute a microphone or silence audio input; indicate that the microphone is currently disabled

fa-microphone-stand.appearanceId: an upright microphone on a tall vertical pole with an adjustable boom arm extending horizontally and a weighted tripod or flat circular base; full mic stand silhouette with a boom arm and base
fa-microphone-stand.functionalityId: represents a microphone stand used in live performance or studio settings; indicates an audio input station or stage equipment
fa-microphone-stand.intentId: set up or manage a microphone stand for a live event or studio session; represent stage or broadcast audio equipment

fa-microscope.appearanceId: a scientific optical microscope silhouette with a vertical eyepiece tube, rotating nosepiece with objective lenses, a horizontal stage platform, and a curved base arm; laboratory microscope outline
fa-microscope.functionalityId: represents scientific research, biology, or laboratory analysis; accesses or indicates microscopy or detailed scientific examination tools
fa-microscope.intentId: access laboratory or scientific analysis features; represent biology, research, or microscopy in an application interface

fa-microwave.appearanceId: a rectangular kitchen appliance body with a viewing window on the left side and a small control panel of buttons on the right; countertop microwave oven outline with door window and controls
fa-microwave.functionalityId: represents a microwave oven appliance or cooking function; controls or indicates a microwave in a smart home or kitchen interface
fa-microwave.intentId: control or monitor a microwave oven in a smart kitchen setup; identify a microwave appliance in a home management interface

fa-mill-sign.appearanceId: a stylized uppercase M-shaped glyph or mill monetary symbol with two vertical strokes crossed by a horizontal double bar; currency or unit-of-measure sign with decorative crossbars
fa-mill-sign.functionalityId: represents the mill monetary unit or a mill sign in financial or historical contexts; displays a fractional currency denomination marker
fa-mill-sign.intentId: display or input a mill monetary value in a financial interface; indicate a fractional currency or historical unit of measure

fa-mind-share.appearanceId: a human head profile or outline with radiating lines or arrows pointing outward from the brain area, suggesting thought sharing; silhouette of a head with diverging thought-wave lines
fa-mind-share.functionalityId: represents knowledge sharing, brainstorming, or collaborative thinking; indicates an idea-sharing or group mindset feature
fa-mind-share.intentId: facilitate knowledge sharing or collaborative ideation; access a brainstorming or shared thinking tool

fa-minimize.appearanceId: two small diagonal inward-pointing arrows facing each other at opposite corners, indicating a shrink or collapse action; converging corner arrows in a square or rectangular arrangement
fa-minimize.functionalityId: shrinks or collapses a window, panel, or element to a smaller size; reduces the displayed area of a UI component
fa-minimize.intentId: minimize or collapse a window or panel to save screen space; reduce the size of a visible interface element

fa-minus.appearanceId: a single short horizontal bar or line centered in the icon space; plain horizontal dash or subtraction stroke
fa-minus.functionalityId: removes, subtracts, or decrements a value or item; collapses or hides a section in a UI
fa-minus.intentId: subtract a value or remove an item from a list; collapse an expandable section or decrease a counter

fa-minus-octagon.appearanceId: a regular eight-sided octagon outline containing a short horizontal minus bar centered inside; octagonal border with a dash glyph in the middle
fa-minus-octagon.functionalityId: represents a prohibited or restricted removal action with a strong warning shape; indicates a blocked or forbidden decrease operation
fa-minus-octagon.intentId: block or restrict a subtraction or removal action; display a strong warning that a decrease operation is prohibited

fa-minus-square.appearanceId: a filled or outlined square shape containing a short horizontal minus bar centered inside; square container with a dash or subtraction glyph
fa-minus-square.functionalityId: collapses or removes an item within a square control; decrements a value or hides content in a square UI element
fa-minus-square.intentId: collapse a tree node or remove an item using a square button; decrease a quantity within a bounded square control

fa-mistletoe.appearanceId: two or three round berries clustered together with small oval leaves and a ribbon or bow at the base; holiday plant sprig with circular berry clusters and paired leaves
fa-mistletoe.functionalityId: represents a mistletoe decoration for holiday or Christmas themes; indicates a festive seasonal element in a design
fa-mistletoe.intentId: add a holiday or Christmas decoration element to a design; indicate a festive winter or seasonal theme

fa-mitten.appearanceId: a winter mitten glove silhouette with a rounded palm, a separate small thumb protrusion on the side, and a cuffed opening at the wrist; hand mitten outline with distinct thumb nub and cuff
fa-mitten.functionalityId: represents winter clothing, cold weather, or a hand covering accessory; indicates seasonal cold-weather gear in a fashion or weather interface
fa-mitten.intentId: browse or select winter cold-weather accessories; indicate cold weather conditions or a winter theme in an application
